author: Trishla Ostwal
title: EXCLUSIVE: Criteo Cuts ChatGPT Ad Minimums, Offers Incentives to Woo Retailer Brands
description: The ad tech firm has lowered campaign minimums from $50,000 to $10,000 and is providing media-match deals as competition for ChatGPT ad dollars intensifies.
content: As brands rush to test advertising inside ChatGPT, Criteo is gaining traction among retail advertisers by offering easier product-feed integrations, financial incentives, and lower spending threshold… [+512 chars]

author: Lauren Johnson
title: Agencies Race to Snap Up Amazon and Walmart Specialists
description: With the biggest shops already acquired and private equity cash pouring in, independents are hunting for scale.
content: Agencies are eyeing small retail media acquisitions to build scale and expertise in the growing space, sparking a quiet trickle of retail-focused M&A across commerce agencies. In May, Podean, a c… [+563 chars]

title: The W3C Is Making A Critical Mistake About Measuring Advertising Effectiveness

author: Mitchell Parton
title: Target has alienated Black-owned brands, founders say, as some startups vanish from its shelves
description: The Black founders Modern Retail spoke with said they found Target to be a frustrating wholesale partner, even before 2025.
